subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of Abdu'l-Baha! Although the expenses of the Holy Land and the Most Holy Shrine pass beyond all reckoning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء هر چند مصارفات ارض مقدسه بقعه بیضاء فزون از حصر و تکالیف
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @business; financial; property matters
